name: E2B Cloud Sandbox
description: Remote cloud sandbox backend powered by E2B protocol. Connect to any E2B-compatible sandbox service.

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: E2B-compatible sandbox manager API URL (e.g. http://host:8000/e2b).

sandboxUrl.label: Sandbox URL
sandboxUrl.help: Data-plane URL for sandbox connections (e.g. http://host:8000).

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for authenticating with the sandbox manager.

workdir.label: Remote Workdir
workdir.help: Working directory inside the sandbox. Defaults to /home/user.

agentWorkdir.label: Remote Agent Workdir
agentWorkdir.help: Agent workspace directory inside the sandbox.

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.help: Sandbox idle timeout in seconds. Defaults to 300.
